indicators.name: Potted plants
indicators.rationale: The presence of potted plants can be distracting and may affect sleep quality.

indicators.name: Table
indicators.rationale: The table is too close to the bed, which might make it difficult to move around without disturbing the sleeper.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene has some negative indicators that could affect sleep quality, such as potted plants and a table too close to the bed.
